typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	TodaysData as integer ()
}

source(output(
		TotlInst as integer,
		EmergencyCount as integer,
		HMLCount_App as integer,
		HMLCount_ProdPlat as integer,
		Non_HMLCount_App as integer,
		Non_HMLCount_ProdPlat as integer,
		TechnicalManager_App1 as string,
		Senior_Lead_Supplimented as string,
		CIO_Direct_Supplimented as string,
		Email_Level as string,
		subject_ as string,
		EMHAstatement as string,
		HMLAPP as string,
		HML_ProdPlat as string,
		Non_HML_App as string,
		Non_HML_ProdPlat as string,
		SrMngrEmail as string,
		CIOdirEmail as string,
		TechMngrEmail as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	format: 'table',
	staged:false) ~> DailySIIMetricView
DailySIIMetricView derive(Import_Date = toDate(toString(addDays(currentDate(), 1), 'MM/dd/yyyy'), "MM/dd/yyyy")) ~> Importdate
Importdate sink(input(
		EMHAstatement as string,
		HMLCount_ProdPlat as integer,
		TechMngrEmail as string,
		TotlInst as integer,
		Senior_Lead_Supplimented as string,
		HMLAPP as string,
		Non_HML_App as string,
		EmergencyCount as integer,
		Import_Date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		Non_HMLCount_App as integer,
		SrMngrEmail as string,
		CIOdirEmail as string,
		TechnicalManager_App1 as string,
		Email_Level as string,
		subject_ as string,
		HML_ProdPlat as string,
		Non_HMLCount_ProdPlat as integer,
		Non_HML_ProdPlat as string,
		HMLCount_App as integer,
		CIO_Direct_Supplimented as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		EMHAstatement,
		HMLCount_ProdPlat,
		TechMngrEmail,
		TotlInst,
		Senior_Lead_Supplimented,
		HMLAPP,
		Non_HML_App,
		EmergencyCount,
		Import_Date,
		Non_HMLCount_App,
		SrMngrEmail,
		CIOdirEmail,
		TechnicalManager_App1,
		Email_Level,
		subject_,
		HML_ProdPlat,
		Non_HMLCount_ProdPlat,
		Non_HML_ProdPlat,
		HMLCount_App,
		CIO_Direct_Supplimented)) ~> tblSIIVulnHistoryAlerts
